IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: SEE SCHEDULE O.KINGS VIEW OFFERS SERVICES FOR SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS, DUI, MENTAL HEALTH, DEVELOPMENTALLY DISABLED ADULTS, TRANSITIONAL AGED YOUTH, AND TELEPSYCHIATRY.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO PROVIDE COMMUNITY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH AND SOCIAL SERVICES TO THOSE WITH LIMITED RESOURCES, IN THE SPIRIT OF CHRIST'S EXAMPLE OF LOVE, COMPASSION AND RESPECT FOR ALL PERSONS.
IRS990.Desc: MENTAL HEALTH PROGRAMS - THE ORGANIZATION PROVIDES COUNTY, STATE AND CITY PROGRAMS. SERVICES ARE OUT-PATIENT AND ARE PROVIDED TO BOTH ADULTS AND CHILDREN. MENTAL HEALTH SERVICE INCLUDE COUNSELING, CRISIS INTERVENTION, MEDICATIONS, DAY TREATMENT, HOMELESS OUTREACH, SUICIDE PREVENTION, WELLNESS, INTER AGENCY REFERRAL, YOUTH EMPOWERMENT AND TELEPSYCHIATRY.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT PROGRAM - THE ORGANIZATION PROVIDES DUI AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES IN TEN LOCATIONS THROUGHOUT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. DURING THE 2023-2024 FISCAL YEAR THESE PROGRAMS SERVED OVER 8,699 CLIENTS AND PROVIDED OVER 167,824 HOURS OF SERVICE.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: DAY ACTIVITY CENTERS - THE KINGS VIEW WORK EXPERIENCE CENTERS IN ATWATER AND LOS BANOS PROVIDE, PRINCIPALLY, WORK EXPERIENCE, VOCATIONAL ASSESSMENT AND ACTIVITIES FOR MENTALLY AND DEVELOPMENTALLY DISABLED CLIENTS. THE PROGRAM SERVED 219 CLIENTS DURING THE FISCAL YEAR WITH APPROXIMATELY 201,595 HOURS OF SERVICE.

ProgSrvcAccomActyOtherGrp.Desc: YOUTH DEVELOPMENT - TRANSITIONAL AGED YOUTH ARE SERVED BY KINGS VIEW IN SEVERAL PROGRAMS. THE SKILLS 4 SUCCESS PROGRAM IN MADERA COUNTY PREPARES THIS POPULATION FOR THE FUTURE THROUGH THE FOLLOWING ACTIVITIES: CLASSES ON EMPLOYMENT RELATED TOPICS, JOB READINESS WORKSHOPS, ACADEMIC TUTORING, PAID WORK EXPERIENCE, LEADERSHIP DEVELOPMENT, AND JOB SHADOWING/MENTORING. MANAGED CARE - KINGS VIEW INITIATED ITS MANAGED CARE SERVICES LINE IN 2022 IN ORDER TO PROVIDE ENHANCED CARE TO MEDI-CAL MANAGED CARE MEMBERS AND ADDRESS THE INCREASED NEED FOR MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES IN CALIFORNIA. THE PROGRAM BEGAN PROVIDING ENHANCED CARE MANAGEMENT SERVICES IN JANUARY 2023 AND SERVICES APPROXIMATELY 2,903 MEMBERS DURING THE CURRENT FISCAL YEAR.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART II, LINE 10, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: OTHER REVENUE RECYCLING LANDSCAPE MAINTENANCE OTHER SERVICE REVENUE - 2020 AMOUNT: $ 165,788. 2021 AMOUNT: $ 54,645. 2022 AMOUNT: $ 209,487. 2023 AMOUNT: $ 155,153.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION FOLLOWS THE ACCOUNTING GUIDANCE FOR ACCOUNTING FOR UNCERTAINTY IN INCOME TAXES. KINGS VIEW IS SUBJECT TO FEDERAL AND STATE INCOME TAXES TO THE EXTENT IT HAS UNRELATED BUSINESS INCOME. IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE GUIDANCE FOR UNCERTAINTY IN INCOME TAXES, MANAGEMENT HAS EVALUATED ITS MATERIAL TAX POSITIONS AND DETERMINED THAT THERE ARE NO UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS AS OF JUNE 30, 2024.
DAVID LOPEZ RECEIVED A SEVERANCE PAYMENT OF $20,741 DURING CALENDAR YEAR 2023.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE COMPLETE FORM 990 IS REVIEWED BY THE CEO, CFO, AND FINANCE COMMITTEE BEFORE PROVIDING IT TO FULL BOARD FOR THEIR REVIEW.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL CONTRACTS OR BUSINESS DEALINGS ARE REVIEWED FOR CONFLICT OF INTEREST SITUATIONS WHEN THE CONTRACTS ARE EXECUTED. CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICIES ARE ANNUALLY ENFORCED AND CONFLICTS ARE MONITORED THROUGH THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE. BOARD MEMBERS, OFFICERS, KEY EMPLOYEES, AND HIGHEST PAID EMPLOYEES ARE REQUIRED TO DISCLOSE AND ATTEST TO RELATED PARTY TRANSACTIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CEO COMPENSATION IS SET BY THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS BASED ON INDEPENDENT MARKET DATA OF COMPARATIVE ORGANIZATIONS. OTHER OFFICERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES' SALARIES ARE APPROVED BY THE CEO AND SET BASED ON INDEPENDENT COMPARATIVE MARKET DATA. EXCEPT FOR THE CEO, ALL SALARIES AND WAGES ARE VETTED BY THE HUMAN RESOURCES AND FINANCE DEPARTMENTS AND APPROVED BY THE CEO. THIS INFORMATION IS MAINTAINED BY HUMAN RESOURCES. COMPENSATION IS REVIEWED ON AN ANNUAL BASIS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE MADE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.
